title: lithocarpus hypophaeus
intro: Lithocarpus hypophaeus, also known as Canyon Live Oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the southwestern United States. The plant's bark and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus hypophaeus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant's bark and leaves can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
